touches.ai_summary: Brief cold call with Ella Ramirez, Head of Sales at CompassForm. Ella expressed interest in improving their sales team's call coaching process. Currently using manual review methods. Agreed to schedule a qualification call to discuss further.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently recording and reviewing sales calls for coaching?
questions_asked.answer: We do some manual spot-checking but nothing systematic. It's time-consuming.

next_steps: Schedule qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Ella to understand CompassForm's sales coaching needs. Team of 8 sales reps struggling with inconsistent messaging and onboarding new hires. Ella mentioned they're also looking at Fathom. Discussed use case around call recording and automated coaching insights. Qualified budget around $7-10K annually.

questions_asked.question: How does your solution differ from Fathom? We've been looking at them too.
questions_asked.answer: We focus more on coaching workflows and team analytics, while Fathom is primarily a notetaker. Our coaching features are purpose-built for sales managers.

questions_asked.question: What's your biggest pain point with sales coaching today?
questions_asked.answer: Honestly, it's just not happening consistently. I don't have time to listen to every call, so new reps aren't getting the feedback they need.

questions_asked.question: Who else would need to be involved in evaluating a tool like this?
questions_asked.answer: Probably just me for now. I own the sales tools budget and our CEO trusts my judgment on this stuff.

next_steps: Ella to map out current coaching process
Schedule discovery call to dive deeper into workflows

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with resources on sales coaching best practices and a comparison guide addressing Fathom. Ella responded thanking for the materials and confirmed discovery call timing.

questions_asked.question: Can you send over pricing ballpark before our next call?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, I'll include a range based on your team size in my calendar invite.

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call diving into CompassForm's sales process and coaching gaps. Ella walked through their current tech stack and onboarding challenges. Discussed specific use cases: ramp time reduction, call review automation, and competitive win rate improvement. Ella shared that Fathom demo is scheduled for next week as well. Identified need for 8 seats with unlimited automation.

questions_asked.question: What does success look like for you in 6 months if you implement this?
questions_asked.answer: New reps hitting quota faster—ideally cutting ramp time from 4 months to 2.5. And me spending less time in 1-on-1s just reviewing basic call issues.

questions_asked.question: How does the unlimited automation tier work? What's included?
questions_asked.answer: It includes automated scorecards, deal risk alerts, custom coaching workflows, and integrations with your CRM. No caps on recordings or users in that tier.

questions_asked.question: When are you hoping to have something in place?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally by end of quarter. We're hiring 2 more reps in May and I want this running before they start.

objections: Ella mentioned budget is tight and wants to make sure this is worth it vs. Fathom at a lower price point
next_steps: Schedule product demo for next week
Ella to share sample call recordings for custom demo

touches.ai_summary: Full product demo showcasing call recording, automated coaching scorecards, and deal risk analysis. Walked through CompassForm's sample calls and showed how platform identifies coaching opportunities. Ella was engaged and asked detailed questions about integration with HubSpot and Slack. Discussed pricing at $7,200/year for 8 seats with unlimited automation tier. Ella mentioned Fathom demo went well but appreciated our coaching-specific features.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the scorecards for our specific sales methodology?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable. You can weight criteria, add custom fields, and even build different scorecards for SDR vs closing calls.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation usually take?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 1-2 weeks. Most of that is just getting your team comfortable with it—technical setup is same-day.

questions_asked.question: What are your thoughts so far compared to the other options you're evaluating?
questions_asked.answer: I really like how this is built for coaching, not just transcription. Fathom is cheaper but feels more generic. I need to think through the ROI.

questions_asked.question: Do you have references from other small PropTech or real estate companies?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I'll connect you with two customers in adjacent spaces—one is a property management SaaS, the other is a real estate data platform.

objections: Price is higher than Fathom—Ella needs to justify the difference internally
next_steps: Ella to schedule time with CEO to discuss

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled exec meeting with Ella and CEO was rescheduled by Ella due to CEO conflict. Ella confirmed still interested and will find new time next week. Brief Slack exchange to stay aligned.
next_steps: Ella to propose new exec meeting time

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Ella. Walked through contract terms, implementation timeline, and ROI projections. Ella appreciated the reference calls and is leaning toward moving forward. However, CEO meeting has been delayed twice now—Ella mentioned he's traveling and hard to pin down. Discussed potential start date and onboarding plan. Ella asked about discount options given budget constraints.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on pricing if we commit to annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We can potentially offer a small discount for annual prepay. Let me check with my manager on what we can do.

questions_asked.question: When do you think we can get time with your CEO? Want to make sure he's aligned before we move forward.
questions_asked.answer: I know, I'm sorry about the reschedules. He's supportive in principle but just slammed right now. I might just move forward on my authority if I can get the numbers to work.

questions_asked.question: What's your best price for this configuration?
questions_asked.answer: Let me work on some options and get back to you in the next day or two.

objections: Ella mentioned CEO availability is a bottleneck but she's trying to move forward independently
next_steps: Send updated proposal with prepay discount option
Ella to attempt one more CEO meeting

touches.ai_summary: Exec meeting finally took place with Ella and CEO. CEO was cordial but mostly listened while Ella presented the business case. He asked a few questions about security and integration but didn't express strong enthusiasm or concern. Deferred final decision to Ella. Discussed contract terms and Ella confirmed she wants to proceed pending final pricing alignment.

questions_asked.question: What does your data security and privacy compliance look like?
questions_asked.answer: We're SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. All call data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Happy to share our security documentation.

questions_asked.question: Any other concerns or questions from your end before we finalize?
questions_asked.answer: No, I think we're good. Ella's got my sign-off to move forward if the pricing works.

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call rescheduled by Ella again due to internal budget meeting conflict. When call finally happened, discussed final pricing options. Ella pushed for deeper discount citing Fathom alternative at lower price point. Agreed on $7,200 annual with 10% first-year discount if signed this week. Ella said she needs one more day to review with finance before final signature.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Fathom's pricing? They're coming in at about $4,800 for our team size.
questions_asked.answer: We can't go that low because our platform is more comprehensive, but I can do $6,480 for year one with the 10% discount. That reflects the value difference in coaching features.

objections: Ella mentioned finance is scrutinizing all new software spend this quarter
next_steps: Send final contract at $6,480 first year pricing
Ella to review with finance and respond by Friday
